goal: Generate $10,000 in gross collected cash by March 31, 2027 without relying on speculative returns.
operating_model: Keep JVT services as the primary cash-flow engine. Use franchise, acquisition, trading, crypto, and hardware ideas as bounded research lanes until their math and approval gates justify action.
score_scale: Each score is 1-5. Higher is better except risk_penalty and approval_load, where higher means more friction.
red_lines: No spending, franchise fees, deposits, subscriptions, applications, or paid research tools without approval.
No third-party prospect emails without explicit send authorization.
No live trades, fund movement, broker setting changes, wallets, mining, staking, or custody workflows.
No legal, tax, financial, medical, or investment advice as an autonomous output.
No external commitments, signed terms, vendor registrations, or client promises without approval.

sources.label: Chick-fil-A franchise opportunity
sources.notes: Official page confirms the low upfront fee, full-time hands-on requirement, and no conflicting active ventures.

sources.label: SBA buying an existing business or franchise
sources.notes: Useful diligence framework for franchise and acquisition lanes.

sources.label: SBA become a federal contractor
sources.notes: Official requirements path for government contracting readiness.

sources.label: SAM.gov entity registration
sources.notes: Official registration system. Registration itself requires operator approval.

daily: Pick one low-risk autonomous next action and move it forward when no approval is required.
weekly: Review top 3 cash-flow lanes and kill or downgrade weak lanes.
Prepare one decision packet for any approval-gated path worth pursuing.
Update public offer or outreach assets only when they sharpen an active wedge.

opportunities.name: JVT productized services
opportunities.target_customer: Small professional offices, consultants, agencies, home-service operators, and admin-heavy local businesses.
opportunities.pain: Calls, meetings, inboxes, forms, and documents create repeated manual follow-up work.
opportunities.offer: Narrow fixed-scope pilots: AI receptionist/intake, meeting-to-action packets, inbox/document triage, workflow cleanup, and document generation.
opportunities.pricing_hypothesis: $500-$1,500 setup for first pilot, then $250-$1,000/mo support depending on scope.
opportunities.time_to_first_revenue: 1-6 weeks if a warm or high-fit prospect agrees to a pilot.
low_risk_next_actions: Hold the five internal packet briefs for review before any queue staging or send approval.
Create or refresh one proof asset from existing dry-run/demo outputs.
Draft a paid-pilot decision packet for operator review.
approval_required_actions: Quote or commit to final pricing.
Enable paid live voice provider usage.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Convert the active proof assets into one paid-pilot ask aimed at high-fit businesses.

opportunities.name: Local partner and reseller channel
opportunities.target_customer: MSPs, web designers, bookkeeping firms, IT consultants, small agencies, and local business consultants.
opportunities.pain: They already have small-business trust but need practical AI/workflow implementation capacity.
opportunities.offer: White-label or referral-based workflow cleanup, meeting packets, intake automation, and inbox triage.
opportunities.pricing_hypothesis: 10%-25% referral fee or fixed wholesale project pricing once a partner brings an approved client.
low_risk_next_actions: Wait for operator review of the partner packet before any partner contact.
Draft a partner one-pager and referral terms for review.
Map which JVT proof assets would matter to each partner type.
approval_required_actions: Offer referral fees or revenue share.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Prepare a partner packet that explains one clean white-label offer and review it before outreach.

opportunities.name: YouTube and Instagram content operations engine
opportunities.target_customer: Internal JVT first; later small professional-service firms that need simple content packets from existing proof assets.
opportunities.pain: JVT has demos and service ideas, but weak public distribution and trust-building content.
opportunities.offer: Turn proof assets, demos, and workflow maps into approval-gated scripts, captions, thumbnail briefs, and post packets for YouTube/Instagram.
opportunities.pricing_hypothesis: Internal distribution first; if productized later, $500-$1,500 setup plus $300-$1,000/mo for weekly content packets.
opportunities.startup_capital: $0 for draft packets and manual posting; paid tools/API work require approval.
opportunities.time_to_first_revenue: 2-4 weeks for internal visibility impact; 1-3 months before selling as a service.
low_risk_next_actions: Hold the AI receptionist content packet for operator review before any manual post or API publishing work.
Create a content idea backlog from existing proof assets.
Define platform approval gates before any posting workflow.
approval_required_actions: Use paid scheduling or editing tools.
Automate comments, DMs, follows, likes, views, or other engagement.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Generate one review-only content packet from the AI receptionist or meeting-to-action demo.

opportunities.name: Vendor and subcontractor readiness
opportunities.target_customer: Local governments, nonprofits, schools, small prime contractors, and agencies needing admin automation help.
opportunities.pain: Organizations need digital workflow support but procurement paths require capability statements and vendor setup.
opportunities.offer: Workflow automation, intake triage, document generation, meeting packets, and managed AI operations as a small-business vendor/subcontractor.
opportunities.pricing_hypothesis: $1,500-$10,000 small projects, then retainers where appropriate.
low_risk_next_actions: Review the draft JVT capabilities statement and mark any NAICS or service claims that need operator approval.
List likely NAICS/PSC categories for review.
Identify five local primes or nonprofits with technology/admin workflow needs.
approval_required_actions: Represent certifications or contracting status externally.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Prepare a vendor-readiness packet before any registration or outreach.

opportunities.name: Low-overhead service franchises
opportunities.target_customer: Business owner/operator path outside JVT: commercial cleaning, mobile services, maintenance, admin support, or B2B local services.
opportunities.pain: Need a more concrete cash-flow business model than speculative trading or crypto.
opportunities.offer: Evaluate franchise/operator systems with low initial capital, recurring revenue, and manageable operations.
opportunities.pricing_hypothesis: Owner cash flow depends on local execution; no revenue assumption until FDD/unit economics are reviewed.
opportunities.startup_capital: $5,000-$50,000+ depending on franchise and working capital.
low_risk_next_actions: Use the franchise diligence checklist to build a no-contact compare sheet for five service franchises.
Shortlist five service franchises by total investment, recurring revenue, owner involvement, and territory model.
Reject any franchise that requires capital or commitments before FDD review.
approval_required_actions: Request franchise information using personal contact details.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Build a compare sheet for five low-overhead service franchises with no contact or commitments.

opportunities.name: Chick-fil-A operator path
opportunities.target_customer: Personal owner-operator path, not passive JVT investing.
opportunities.pain: Potentially high-income operating role with unusually low initial franchise fee.
opportunities.offer: Track requirements and prepare a candidacy profile only if full-time restaurant operation is actually desired.
opportunities.pricing_hypothesis: $10,000 initial franchise fee if selected, but not an asset purchase or passive investment.
opportunities.startup_capital: $10,000 non-gifted, non-borrowed initial fee plus personal runway and opportunity cost.
opportunities.time_to_first_revenue: Long and uncertain; selection can be highly competitive.
low_risk_next_actions: Keep a one-page fact sheet with official requirements.
List profile gaps: full-time availability, leadership history, community involvement, and business focus.
Decide whether this conflicts with the JVT $10k target before doing anything external.
approval_required_actions: Represent intent to divest or commit full-time.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Treat as monitored optionality, not a near-term cash-flow plan.

opportunities.name: Small business acquisition search
opportunities.target_customer: Existing local or online business owners looking to sell small cash-flow assets.
opportunities.pain: Buying revenue can be faster than building from scratch if diligence is strong and capital is available.
opportunities.offer: Screen micro-acquisitions: local service businesses, small SaaS/tools, content sites, or admin-service books.
opportunities.pricing_hypothesis: Target payback under 24-36 months only after verified books; no assumed return yet.
opportunities.time_to_first_revenue: Revenue exists if acquisition closes; diligence and financing can take months.
low_risk_next_actions: Use the acquisition filter to create a no-contact watchlist schema before looking at listings.
Create a diligence checklist.
Build a no-contact watchlist of public listings for pattern learning.
approval_required_actions: Pay deposits or due diligence fees.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Create an acquisition filter before looking at listings seriously.

opportunities.name: Paper AutoTrader research
opportunities.target_customer: Internal learning and possible future strategy validation.
opportunities.pain: Manual trading ideas are emotional and hard to validate.
opportunities.offer: Paper-only market data, backtests, catalyst scoring, and risk reports.
opportunities.pricing_hypothesis: No revenue counted toward the March 2027 goal until a verified edge exists.
low_risk_next_actions: Refresh paper-only account snapshot and backtest reports.
Add walk-forward validation before any strategy promotion.
Surface paper trader status in the control panel.
approval_required_actions: Use live endpoint or live keys.
Move funds or change broker settings.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Build a 30-60 day paper tracking record with benchmark comparisons.

opportunities.name: Crypto, compute, and mining research
opportunities.target_customer: Internal feasibility first; no public offer unless a real edge appears.
opportunities.pain: Mining and compute-hosting hype hides power, heat, capex, depreciation, custody, and utilization risk.
opportunities.offer: Read-only feasibility calculator and hardware/power watchlist.
opportunities.pricing_hypothesis: No revenue counted until hardware and power economics are proven.
opportunities.startup_capital: $0 while research-only; hardware would require separate approval.
opportunities.time_to_first_revenue: Unknown; likely poor without cheap power or differentiated hosting demand.
opportunities.delivery_complexity: Medium for calculator, high for real operations.
low_risk_next_actions: Keep profitability math read-only.
Compare mining, staking, and GPU hosting assumptions without creating accounts or wallets.
Document why a hardware buy is or is not justified.
approval_required_actions: Join compute marketplaces with payment/custody terms.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Refresh read-only feasibility assumptions and reject paths with bad payback.

opportunities.name: Dental office AI voice intake pilot
opportunities.target_customer: Small dental offices and specialty practices that miss calls, handle after-hours requests, or need better intake notes before staff follow-up.
opportunities.pain: Patients call with scheduling, insurance, urgency, and callback needs. Staff lose time collecting the same details and after-hours callers often leave incomplete voicemails.
opportunities.offer: AI-disclosed voice intake assistant that captures caller name, callback number, patient/new-patient status, request type, urgency flags, preferred windows, and insurance carrier name only, then creates a staff-review packet. It does not diagnose, confirm coverage, or book final appointments without office approval.
opportunities.pricing_hypothesis: $750-$1,500 setup for a dry-run pilot, then $300-$900/mo for monitored intake/support once provider costs and call volume are known.
opportunities.startup_capital: $0 for dry-run demo and script design; paid phone/provider usage requires approval.
opportunities.time_to_first_revenue: 1-4 weeks if the warm dental lead agrees to a scoped pilot.
risks: Scope creep into scheduling or advice
Provider cost if call volume grows
low_risk_next_actions: Create a dental-intake decision packet from the existing BrightPath dry-run intakes and Chandru voice sample constraints.
Prepare a one-page pilot scope with hard boundaries: no diagnosis, no medication advice, no final booking, no coverage confirmation.
Build a latency/quality checklist before any live phone-provider test.
approval_required_actions: Represent HIPAA, legal, or medical compliance externally.
Quote or commit to final pricing.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Generate a review-only dental pilot packet and collect the office's real workflow details before outreach.

opportunities.name: BITS-style ballot and board-meeting workflow automation pilot
opportunities.target_customer: IT/AV consulting firms that support housing complexes, election committees, board meetings, and third-party ballot/election administration workflows.
opportunities.pain: Ballot and board-meeting services involve repetitive packet creation, deadline tracking, voter/resident communication, meeting artifacts, evidence organization, and handoff checklists where mistakes create trust and compliance risk.
opportunities.offer: Human-reviewed workflow assistant for ballot project setup, checklist generation, document packet assembly, meeting-to-action notes, status summaries, and exception tracking. It does not certify election results or make legal/compliance determinations.
opportunities.pricing_hypothesis: $1,000-$2,500 discovery/build pilot for one workflow slice, then $500-$1,500/mo managed AI operations depending on volume and review load.
opportunities.startup_capital: $0-$250 for internal demo/prototype work before any paid integrations.
opportunities.time_to_first_revenue: 2-6 weeks if a warm BITS-style contact agrees to a narrow pilot.
risks: Custom workflow discovery may expand scope
low_risk_next_actions: Create a research packet that maps ballot lifecycle stages, repeatable artifacts, approval gates, and no-go compliance boundaries.
Prepare a discovery questionnaire for the warm contact before any technical build.
Draft a demo concept using synthetic board/ballot data only.
approval_required_actions: Handle real resident, voter, board, or client records.
Commit pricing, delivery dates, or integrations.
opportunities.next_validation_step: Generate a review-only ballot workflow discovery packet using synthetic data and explicit human-review boundaries.
